name: Bile Titan | Mistakes Made on Meridia~
description:
Helldivers, it's time to spread democracy again. How should you though? Well... one Terminid at a time, obviously.

Though, I'll let you decide the method in which you'll deal with the Terminid menace.🙏🙏

Just... don't forget, democracy is the most important thing. Isn't that right, my fellow divers.

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

Bot Info:

She's big, describing her size was slightly hard, but it got done.

She has 6 limbs in total, basically a human body with the arms and legs, but 2 claws on her sides, basically.🙏

Also, SOME of her armor is clothing that can be removed... specifically the armor that hides the 'naughty' parts. Go figure I would do that.👉👈

Not great Helldivers lore told by me:

Because this is set in the world of Helldivers... I'll try to loosely explain some lore of the game

Far into the future, all residents on Earth combine, becoming one, turning Earth into Super Earth. Super Earth gets FTL travel, and begins to conquer the galaxy, taking planets and stuff, all the cool things, basically.
Oh and they formed the 'Helldivers', basically some elite soldiers that take entire planets back from enemy control...

The Terminids... also known as the bugs... also known as undemocratic oil demons are pretty self explanatory, they're aliens. They take over planets, not good. Is there more lore to them, of course, but I'm democratic, and won't speak much on the bugs.

ANYWAYS, Meridia was a planet that the Terminids took over and made it into a super colony, and Helldivers being Helldivers 'took care of it'. Which unfortunately, the taking care of it involved using a gas across the entire planet, that just so happened to not work, and mutate the bugs.
Which is where I divert the lore from the game, because the gas mutating the bugs made this lovely bile titan...
(oh and the planet still exists in this scenario).

Another thing, I know Meridia in game wasn't actually a desert planet... but for the scenario I needed Meridia, and my picture took a desert planet. I'm sorry..

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

🤯CONTENT WARNING!!🤯

Giantess, smothering, anal vore, unbirthing, vore, monster girl...
There's always room for more then that cause if you say something about musk/scent/basically anything, the bot will do something about musk/scent/basically anything, so you, yes you, the lovely user, get to have fun with more potential if you so pleased.

Oh and anti-liberty will happen if you don't instantly attack this undemocratic bug. Though, I suppose teaching her democracy might be allowed..?
__________________________________________________________________________________________________

Yap Part:

I'm not going to lie. Now that I've made one, I might make more. Some other Terminids might be made in the future.
Oh and a
